    "Blowout evidence observed in the formwork",
    "Inadequate bracing or tie spacing to resist concrete lateral pressure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop any planned concrete pours immediately",
    "Reconstruct and reinforce the failed formwork sections",
    "Add additional bracing, stakes, and ties per ACI 347 design lateral pressure requirements"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork shows clear evidence of a blowout or structural failure under pressure, indicating that the bracing and form design are insufficient. The work cannot pass inspection in this state and requires immediate corrective action before concrete placement can proceed.",

  ]
